SEARCH
Package com.stevenlagoy.presidency.map

Class State

java.lang.Object
com.stevenlagoy.presidency.map.State
All Implemented Interfaces:
Jsonic<State>, Repr<State>, MapEntity
public class State extends Object implements MapEntity, Repr<State>, Jsonic<State>
Map entity for the second-largest geographical division, including States, Commonwealths, District, and Territories.

Holds values describing information about the state, its demographics and voting patterns, and leadership.

    Constructors

    To be used before Characters are ready to be generated.

      public int getPopulation()
      Description copied from interface: MapEntity
      Get the total population.
      Specified by:
      getPopulation in interface MapEntity

    • setPopulation

      public void setPopulation(int population)
      Description copied from interface: MapEntity
      Set the total population.

      Minimum population is zero. If the population is found to be lower, it will be set to zero.

      Specified by:
      setPopulation in interface MapEntity
      Parameters:
      population - New population.

    • addPopulation

      public void addPopulation(int population)
      Description copied from interface: MapEntity
      Add to the total population.

      Minimum population is zero. If the population is found to be lower, it will be set to zero.

      Specified by:
      addPopulation in interface MapEntity
      Parameters:
      population - Amount of population to be added.

      Description copied from interface: MapEntity

      public void setLandArea(double area)
      Description copied from interface: MapEntity
      Set the total land area.

      Minimum land area is zero. If the land area is found to be lower, it will be set to zero.

      Specified by:
      setLandArea in interface MapEntity
      Parameters:
      area - New land area

    • getDemographicPercentage

      public float getDemographicPercentage(Bloc bloc)
      Description copied from interface: MapEntity
      Get the percentage of a demographic bloc's share within its category.
      Specified by:
      getDemographicPercentage in interface MapEntity
      Parameters:
      bloc - The bloc to evaluate.
      Returns:
      Float between 0.0 and 1.0 for the bloc's category share.
      See Also:
      • MapEntity.getDemographicPopulation(Bloc)

    • getDemographicPopulation

      public int getDemographicPopulation(Bloc bloc)
      Description copied from interface: MapEntity
      Get the population of a demographic bloc's membership.
      Specified by:
      getDemographicPopulation in interface MapEntity
      Parameters:
      bloc - The bloc to evaluate.
      Returns:
      int between zero and the population.
      See Also:
      • MapEntity.getPopulation()
      • MapEntity.getDemographicPercentage(Bloc)

    • getSenators

      public List<FederalOfficial> getSenators()

    • setSenators

      public void setSenators(Engine engine, List<FederalOfficial> senators)
      Sets the senators list to the first two FederalOfficials in the passed List, and generates any necessary. Pass with an empty list or null to have both senators generated.

      public List<ElectionResult> getPastResults()

      public void addPastResult(ElectionResult result)

      public List<ElectionResult> getResultsInYear(int year)

    • getTotalVotesInYear

      public int getTotalVotesInYear(int year)

    • getTotalResultsForPartyByYear

      public Map<Integer,Integer> getTotalResultsForPartyByYear(Party party)
      Get the sum of all votes for a party sorted by year. Keys are years, values are total votes for all candidates from the party cast that year.

    • getPartyControl

      public double getPartyControl(Party party, Engine engine)
      Returns a double value representing the level of control of a party, based on control of the state legislature, governor, and previous electoral results. Higher values mean more control.

    • fromRepr

      public State fromRepr(String repr)
      Interpret an Object from a valid Repr String.
      Specified by:
      fromRepr in interface Repr<State>
      Parameters:
      repr - A Repr-formatted String to parse.
      Returns:
      The created object if interpreted properly from the Repr String, null otherwise.
